Hello and Welcome!

This site is basically just a dumping ground for all of my projects that I feel like making public, with the occasional blog post here and there. Don't expect too much consistency from me.

Currently listening to: Dancing with your eyes closed - Jane Remover
(What else have I been listing to?)

Contact Me

  • Email: contact [at] sainthood [dot] xyz
  • Mastodon: sainthood@indieweb.social

Please keep in mind that I do not get push notifications for either of these! I try to check them regularly, but I may take a while to respond to messages, please be patient with me.
